summary: High‑quality copy of a hot early‑fall show featuring a standout Dark Star → Morning Dew splice, though a few listeners note minor vocal bleed.
review: Fans rave about this energetic early‑fall concert, calling it an "excellent" and "one of the best shows ever," with particular praise for the extended Dark Star that segues into a nicely edited Morning Dew. The recording is generally clean – reviewers appreciate the splice – but one listener points out an odd vocal bleed before “Let Me Sing Your Blues Away,” suggesting a small tape‑issue.

ai_rating.rationale: Two strong 5‑star reviews highlight an outstanding performance and good sound, while one 2‑star review notes a minor recording flaw; overall the show shines more than the small technical issue detracts.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Splice at the end of Dark Star into Morning Dew praised; a few listeners hear unexpected vocal bleed before “Let Me Sing Your Blues Away,” indicating minor tape/bleed‑through issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic first half leads into a powerful second set highlighted by an extended Dark Star that transitions smoothly into a well‑edited Morning Dew.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal presence is heard earlier than expected, noted as a minor issue.
